name: ASUS ProArt Z790-CREATOR WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - 2x DP Input - HDMI 2.1 - Marvell AQtion 10Gb LAN - 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: ASUS ProArt Z790-CREATOR WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 2x
description: Professional workstation ATX motherboard with LGA 1700 socket, dual USB4, and high-speed 10Gb networking.
